mission.title: surrealdb: Bug: Rust fails to build surrealdb
mission.description: Bug: Rust fails to build surrealdb. This issue affects 6+ users.

steps.title: Identify surrealdb troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your surrealdb installation:
```bash
surreal version
surreal is-ready
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review surrealdb configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:
### Describe the bug

cargo build fails with this message:
```
   Compiling rocksdb v0.21.0
   Compiling surrealdb-core v2.0.0-1.5.0
   Compiling surrealdb-core v1.4.2
   Compiling surrealdb v1.5.0
error[E0599]: no method named

steps.title: Apply the fix for Bug: Rust fails to build surrealdb
steps.description:
Thank you for submitting this pull request! We really appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.

## What is the motivation?
## What does this change do?

Fixes the issue

## What is your testing strategy?

Two micro test project linking with the lib (with and without `sql2`) have
```yaml
Compiling rocksdb v0.21.0
   Compiling surrealdb-core v2.0.0-1.5.0
   Compiling surrealdb-core v1.4.2
   Compiling surrealdb v1.5.0
error[E0599]: no method named `with_temporary_directory` found for struct `Datastore` in the current scope
   --> /home/miladamery/.cargo/registry/src/index.crates.io-6f17d22bba15001f/surrealdb-1.5.0/src/api/engine/local/native.rs:156:17
    |
156 |         let kvs = kvs.with_temporary_directory(address.config.temporary_directory);
    |
```

steps.title: Confirm Bug: Rust fails to build surrealdb is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test surrealdb to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

prerequisites.description: A working surrealdb installation or development environment.
